title: When Forgiveness Was a Trap - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian and author Ada Palmer on the concept of forgiveness in history. The title suggests an examination of how forgiveness functioned as a social or political mechanism.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian and author Ada Palmer about forgiveness as a force in history. The conversation frames forgiveness not as a purely moral gesture but as a social and political mechanism, with the title pointing to cases where it operated as a trap. The discussion draws on Palmer's perspective as a historian to examine how forgiveness functioned in past societies.
